Premium Aluminum Fabrication Solutions

Crafting excellence with precision engineering and modern design.

Built Strong. Built to Last

Why Choose Us

Quality Assured

Best quality grade aluminium for the longer sustainability

Fast Delivery

Quick turnaround times without compromising on quality standards

24/7 Support

Round-the-clock customer support for all your fabrication needs

Custom Solutions

Tailored designs for your unique requirements and specifications

analysis requirement

analyis the workspace and provide solutions accordingly

Our Services

Fbarications

Transforming aluminium into strong, sleek, and sustainable solutions for homes, offices, and industries.

Mirrors

Crafting mirrors that combine flawless clarity with modern design, adding beauty to homes and offices

Celling

Designing and installing ceilings that combine strength, elegance, and modern style for every space

Finishing

Anodizing, powder coating, and polishing for perfect surfaces

glass works

From sleek partitions to custom installations, our glass work enhances interiors with elegance and durability

CNC Cutting

Precision cutting with advanced CNC machinery for exact dimensions

wallpaper

got problems with your old section and don't want to upgrade,we can repair it!

blinds

got problems with your old section and don't want to upgrade,we can repair it!

SS railings

got problems with your old section and don't want to upgrade,we can repair it!

got problems with your old section and don't want to upgrade,we can repair it!

About HATIMI ALUMINUM

With over 20 years of experience in aluminum fabrication, we have evry possible solutions for your desired problem.

We specialize in premium aluminium fabrication, delivering durable, precise, and custom-made solutions for residential, commercial, and industrial needs. Our expertise ensures high-quality finishes, modern designs, and long-lasting performance
